steps.label: Establish procedure to determine what needs documentation
steps.action_object: procedure for determining what procedures or processes need to be documented

steps.label: Assign subject-matter experts to write SOPs
steps.action_object: subject-matter experts knowledgeable with the activity and organization's internal structure

constraints.text: individuals knowledgeable with the activity and the organization's internal structure

steps.label: Write SOP with sufficient detail for reproduction
steps.action_object: SOP with sufficient detail for unsupervised reproduction by individuals with limited experience

constraints.text: written with sufficient detail so that someone with limited experience with or knowledge of the procedure, but with a basic understanding, can successfully reproduce the procedure when unsupervised

steps.label: Note experience requirements in personnel qualifications section
steps.action_object: experience requirement for performing the activity in personnel qualifications section

constraints.text: experience requirement for performing an activity should be noted in the section on personnel qualifications

steps.label: Review draft SOP by individuals with appropriate training
steps.action_object: draft SOP by one or more individuals with appropriate training and experience

constraints.text: reviewed by one or more individuals with appropriate training and experience with the process

steps.label: Test draft SOP by individuals other than original writer
steps.action_object: draft SOP by individuals other than the original writer

constraints.text: draft SOPs are actually tested by individuals other than the original writer before the SOPs are finalized

steps.label: Finalize SOP based on review and testing
steps.action_object: SOP based on review and testing results

steps.label: Submit SOP for approval to immediate supervisor
steps.action_object: finalized SOP to immediate supervisor for review and approval

constraints.text: approved as described in the organization's Quality Management Plan or its own SOP for preparation of SOPs
immediate supervisor, such as a section or branch chief, and the organization's quality assurance officer review and approve each SOP

steps.label: Submit SOP for approval to quality assurance officer
steps.action_object: finalized SOP to quality assurance officer for review and approval

steps.label: Obtain signature approval on SOP
steps.action_object: signature approval on SOP from authorized personnel

constraints.text: Signature approval indicates that an SOP has been both reviewed and approved by management

steps.label: Use electronic signatures as substitute for paper when practical
steps.action_object: electronic signatures for approval and maintenance of SOP

constraints.text: use of electronic signatures, as well as electronic maintenance and submission, is an acceptable substitution for paper, when practical

steps.label: Update SOP when procedures are changed
steps.action_object: SOP whenever procedures are changed

constraints.text: whenever procedures are changed, SOPs should be updated and re-approved

steps.label: Modify pertinent section and indicate change date
steps.action_object: pertinent section of SOP and indicate change date/revision number

constraints.text: modify only the pertinent section of an SOP and indicate the change date/revision number for that section

steps.label: Update Table of Contents with revision information
steps.action_object: Table of Contents with change date and revision number for modified section

constraints.text: Table of Contents and the document control notation updated with revision information

steps.label: Re-approve updated SOP
steps.action_object: updated SOP

steps.label: Systematically review SOP on periodic basis
steps.action_object: SOP on a periodic basis (e.g., every 1-2 years) to ensure current and appropriate

constraints.text: SOPs should be systematically reviewed on a periodic basis, e.g. every 1-2 years

steps.label: Add review date to reviewed SOP
steps.action_object: review date to each SOP that has been reviewed

constraints.text: review date should be added to each SOP that has been reviewed

steps.label: Withdraw obsolete SOP from current file
steps.action_object: SOP that describes process no longer followed from current file

constraints.text: if an SOP describes a process that is no longer followed, it should be withdrawn from the current file

steps.label: Archive withdrawn SOP
steps.action_object: withdrawn SOP for historical reference

constraints.text: withdrawn SOP archived

steps.label: Reference checklists at points where they are used
steps.action_object: checklists or forms at the points in the procedure where they are to be used

constraints.text: checklists or forms included as part of an activity should be referenced at the points in the procedure where they are to be used

steps.label: Attach checklists to SOP
steps.action_object: checklists or forms to the SOP

constraints.text: checklists attached to the SOP

steps.label: Prepare detailed checklists for given activities
steps.action_object: detailed checklists specifically for a given activity

constraints.text: detailed checklists prepared specifically for a given activity

steps.label: Describe checklist preparation in SOP
steps.action_object: in the SOP how the checklist is to be prepared or what it is to be based on

constraints.text: SOP should describe, at least generally, how the checklist is to be prepared, or on what it is to be based

steps.label: Maintain copies of specific checklists in file
steps.action_object: copies of specific checklists in the file with activity results and/or with the SOP

constraints.text: copies of specific checklists maintained in the file with the activity results and/or with the SOP

steps.label: Develop numbering system for SOPs
steps.action_object: numbering system to systematically identify and label SOPs

constraints.text: organization should develop a numbering system to systematically identify and label their SOPs
document control should be described in its Quality Management Plan

steps.label: Add control documentation notation to each SOP page
steps.action_object: control documentation notation (short title, ID number, revision number, date, page count) to each SOP page

constraints.text: each page of an SOP should have control documentation notation

steps.label: Place document control notation in upper right corner
steps.action_object: document control notation in upper right-hand corner of each document page following title page

constraints.text: document control notation located in the upper right-hand corner of each document page following the title page

steps.label: Maintain master list of all SOPs
steps.action_object: master list of all SOPs in file or database

constraints.text: organization maintain a master list of all SOPs

steps.label: Include SOP details in master list
steps.action_object: SOP number, version number, date of issuance, title, author, status, organizational division, branch, section, and historical information in master list

constraints.text: master list should indicate the SOP number, version number, date of issuance, title, author, status, organizational division, branch, section, and any historical information regarding past versions

steps.label: Assign QA Manager responsibility for SOP tracking
steps.action_object: QA Manager (or designee) responsibility for maintaining file listing all current quality-related SOPs

constraints.text: QA Manager (or designee) is generally the individual responsible for maintaining a file listing all current quality-related SOPs used within the organization

steps.label: Set up automatic review notices in electronic database
steps.action_object: automatic 'Review SOP' notices sent from electronic database

constraints.text: if an electronic database is used, automatic "Review SOP" notices can be sent

steps.label: Designate individual responsible for current version assurance
steps.action_object: individual(s) responsible for assuring that only the current version is used

constraints.text: Quality Management Plan should indicate the individual(s) responsible for assuring that only the current version is used

steps.label: Specify archival location and method for outdated versions
steps.action_object: where and how outdated versions are to be maintained or archived to prevent use

constraints.text: Quality Management Plan should designate where, and how, outdated versions are to be maintained or archived in a manner to prevent their continued use, as well as to be available for historical data review

steps.label: Store outdated versions to enable historical data review
steps.action_object: outdated versions in manner to be available for historical data review

constraints.text: outdated versions maintained or archived in a manner to prevent their continued use, as well as to be available for historical data review

steps.label: Use electronic storage and retrieval mechanisms for SOP access
steps.action_object: electronic storage and retrieval mechanisms for easier access to SOPs

constraints.text: electronic storage and retrieval mechanisms

steps.label: Limit user electronic access to read-only format
steps.action_object: user electronic access to read-only format to protect against unauthorized changes

constraints.text: for the user, electronic access can be limited to a read-only format, thereby protecting against unauthorized changes made to the document

constraint:C6 EDIT ['type'] -- Text says approval should follow the Quality Management Plan; this is a precondition for S8/S9, not a precondition to them. Type should be 'postcondition' or 'guard' describing what must be true before approval happens, but as written it describes the process itself.
constraint:C7 ACCEPT
constraint:C8 ACCEPT
constraint:C9 ACCEPT
constraint:C10 EDIT ['enforcement'] -- Source text (2.3): 'whenever procedures are changed, SOPs should be updated and re-approved.' The prescriptive force here is stronger than a suggestion—this is a standing requirement, not optional.
constraint:C11 ACCEPT
constraint:C12 ACCEPT
constraint:C13 EDIT ['enforcement'] -- Source text (2.3): 'SOPs need to remain current to be useful. Therefore... SOPs should be also systematically reviewed on a periodic basis.' This is mandatory maintenance, not discretionary.
